# SKILL-verify-live.md
# YDNT — Live Site Verification Protocol
# Save to: /Users/nicholasdemeter/Documents/youdontneedthis-site/skills/SKILL-verify-live.md

## DRAFT STATUS — June 22, 2026
## CONTINGENCY: Image loading on live site is UNRESOLVED as of this writing.
## Thumbnails and photos are not rendering on youdontneedthis.us despite:
## - Correct GitHub URLs being generated by build.js
## - Images confirmed present on GitHub inventory repo (curl returns 200)
## - Local build working correctly
## DO NOT assume image loading is fixed until verified with Step 5 below.

---

## GOLDEN RULE
Browser cache is NEVER ground truth. Always use curl for verification.
Never report "site is updated" without running the curl commands below.

---

## STEP 1 — IS THE RIGHT BUILD LIVE?
```bash
curl -s https://youdontneedthis.us | grep -c "PREMIUM ITEMS\|hero-stats"
```
Expected: `0` = correct build is live
If `2` = old build still cached. Wait 2-3 minutes and retry. Do NOT push again.
If still `2` after 10 minutes = check GitHub Actions tab for failed workflow.

## STEP 2 — WHAT COMMIT IS LIVE ON GITHUB?
```bash
curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/NicholasDemeter/youdontneedthis-site/commits/main | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['sha'][:7], d['commit']['message'])"
```
Should match your most recent commit message exactly.

## STEP 3 — IS GITHUB ACTIONS WORKFLOW RUNNING?
Go to: https://github.com/NicholasDemeter/youdontneedthis-site/actions
Most recent run should be green and triggered by your commit.
If red = workflow failed. Click it to see error.
If missing = workflow was not triggered. Check deploy.yml exists at .github/workflows/deploy.yml

## STEP 4 — WHAT IS THE CACHE AGE?
```bash
curl -s -I https://youdontneedthis.us | grep -i "age\|cache\|last-modified\|etag"
```
Key values:
- `age:` = seconds since this cached copy was generated
- `max-age=600` = cache expires after 600 seconds (10 minutes)
- `last-modified:` = when the file was last changed on GitHub Pages
If last-modified date is old (weeks/months ago) = wrong file being served

## STEP 5 — ARE IMAGES LOADING? (UNRESOLVED AS OF JUNE 22, 2026)
```bash
# Test if a specific image URL is accessible
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NicholasDemeter/youdontneedthis-inventory/main/LOT_002_Microsoft_Surface_Studio_2_All_in_One_Desktop/LOT_002_THUMBNAIL.jpg"
```
Expected: `200` = image exists and is accessible
If `404` = image not on GitHub. Check inventory repo push succeeded.
If `200` but images still not showing in browser = CORS or mixed content issue. 
  Investigate: browser console errors, GitHub raw content headers.

## STEP 6 — PLACEHOLDER COUNT
```bash
curl -s https://youdontneedthis.us | grep -c "No Image Available"
```
NOTE: This counts SVG placeholder definition strings in JS, not just broken images.
A count of 2-5 is normal (LOT_023, LOT_064 have no inventory folders).
A count of 100+ means GitHub Actions rebuilt without local inventory access.

## STEP 7 — VISUAL VERIFICATION (last step, not first)
Only after steps 1-6 are confirmed, open browser:
- Hard refresh: Cmd+Shift+R
- Or incognito window: Cmd+Shift+N
Check: hero video, hot items carousel, product cards, dropdown filter

---

## FAILURE MODES AND FIXES

### "Site not updating after push"
1. Check GitHub Actions tab — did workflow run?
2. Check cache age — is it within 600 seconds?
3. Check commit SHA matches GitHub

### "Images not loading" (ACTIVE ISSUE as of June 22, 2026)
Known facts:
- build.js generates correct raw.githubusercontent.com URLs
- Images confirmed on GitHub inventory repo (200 response)
- Local build works correctly
- Issue persists on live site
Unknown: whether this is CORS, browser security, or GitHub rate limiting
Next diagnostic: check browser console errors on youdontneedthis.us

### "110+ placeholders in dist/index.html"
GitHub Actions ran build.js on GitHub servers without local inventory.
Fix: always build locally first, commit dist/index.html, then push.
The workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml should NOT run build.js.

### "Push rejected"
```bash
git stash push -m "temp"
git pull --rebase origin main
git push origin main
git stash pop
```

### "Inventory push rejected"
```bash
git -C /Users/nicholasdemeter/Documents/youdontneedthis-inventory push origin master:main --force
```
Only use --force if local inventory is confirmed newer than GitHub.
